attacking_style: Insufficient data to establish clear attacking patterns. Observations show reactive positioning rather than proactive attacking behavior in decisive race moments.
team_tactics: No clear team tactical patterns observed. Appears to race without dedicated domestique support in finale situations based on available data.
terrain_preference: Struggles on punchy climbs like Cauberg when race selection occurs. Wheel positioning and tactical awareness appear as limiting factors rather than physical terrain capability.
vulnerability: Exposed in chaotic finales and when quick accelerations occur. Loses positioning on decisive climbs not due to physical weakness but poor wheel selection and timing.
key_patterns: Missed decisive moves despite being present, indicating positioning/anticipation weakness in critical moments
Failed to follow wheels on Cauberg climb, suggesting tactical inexperience in selective racing
Wheel positioning errors in finale situations reveal race craft deficits over physical limitations
form_trajectory: unknown: limited observations prevent assessment of physical form, but tactical execution shows developmental gaps
